title: Steve's Lava Chicken
description: A resource pack that turns cooked chicken into Steve's Lava Chicken.
body:
Turn's Cooked Chicken into Steve's Lava Chicken, along with renaming the item.

![mmmm yummy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a54fc336c6c1e3f4df9a4ca4d62a5e1de7f9654_0.webp)

if you find any issues contact me on discord: endl3ss8589
